title:
PROMPT 010: Shopping Cart вЂ” Add to Cart
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1080px (1:1)
DURATION: 2.2s | LOOP: No
SVG: Shopping cart (4 paths: cart body, handle, 2 wheels) вЂ” position 540Г—580px, 130px wide
SVG EXTRA: Small "+" badge circle (36px, top-right of cart)

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #FFF7ED (warm cream)
Cart stroke: #EA580C (orange, stroke-only, 6px)
Cart fill: none
Badge fill: #EA580C (orange)
Badge "+" text: #FFFFFF (white, 20pt bold)
Success tick: #16A34A (green)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Cart icon centered-bottom area (540Г—620px). Badge starts invisible.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (2.2s total):
0вЂ“0.2s: Cart scales 0.8 в†’ 1.0 (ease-out spring).
0.2вЂ“0.5s: Cart rocks slightly (rotate -6В° в†’ +6В° в†’ 0В°, ease-in-out) вЂ” shopping motion.
0.5вЂ“0.7s: Badge "+" appears from top-right (scale 0 в†’ 1.0 with spring, position 620Г—490px).
0.7вЂ“0.9s: Badge transitions "+" в†’ checkmark (morph or swap, 0.2s crossfade). Color stays orange в†’ brief flash в†’ green #16A34A.
0.9вЂ“1.2s: Green glow from badge (blur 0 в†’ 14px в†’ 0, ease-in-out).
1.2вЂ“2.0s: Cart and badge hold. Subtle float bounce (Y 0 в†’ -8px в†’ 0, ease-in-out, 0.8s).
2.0вЂ“2.2s: Hold.

EASING CURVES:
- Entry spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Rock: ease-in-out
- Badge morph: ease-out
